artifacts.name: Cloud Security Policy
artifacts.description: Overarching policy governing cloud security standards, acceptable use, and responsibilities

artifacts.name: IAM Policy Matrix
artifacts.description: Matrix of all IAM roles, policies, and permission boundaries mapped to job functions

artifacts.name: Encryption Standard
artifacts.description: Approved encryption algorithms, key lengths, and KMS configuration requirements

artifacts.name: Network Architecture Diagram
artifacts.description: VPC/VNet topology with subnets, security groups, NACLs, and traffic flows

artifacts.name: Incident Response Playbook
artifacts.description: Cloud-specific IR playbooks for credential compromise, data exposure, cryptomining, and DDoS

artifacts.name: DR Test Report
artifacts.description: Results of disaster recovery test including RTO/RPO achievement and lessons learned

artifacts.name: Vulnerability Scan Report
artifacts.description: Automated scan results from CSPM, container scanning, and infrastructure scanning

artifacts.name: Penetration Test Report
artifacts.description: Third-party cloud penetration test results with findings and remediation tracking

artifacts.name: Cloud Configuration Baseline
artifacts.description: CIS Benchmark compliance baseline with approved deviations documented

artifacts.name: SBOM (Software Bill of Materials)
artifacts.description: Inventory of all software components, libraries, and dependencies in deployed applications

artifacts.name: Data Classification Register
artifacts.description: Register of all cloud data stores with classification level and handling requirements

artifacts.name: Access Review Report
artifacts.description: Quarterly access review results with certification/revocation decisions

artifacts.name: Cloud Asset Inventory
artifacts.description: Complete inventory of all cloud resources across accounts/subscriptions/projects

artifacts.name: Key Management Procedure
artifacts.description: Procedures for key creation, rotation, revocation, and emergency recovery

artifacts.name: Container Image Approval List
artifacts.description: Approved base images and registries for container deployments

artifacts.name: Cloud Vendor Risk Assessment
artifacts.description: Risk assessment of CSP and third-party cloud services

artifacts.name: Log Retention Matrix
artifacts.description: Matrix of all cloud log sources with retention periods and storage locations

artifacts.name: Backup Configuration Report
artifacts.description: Configuration of all backup policies including schedule, retention, and cross-region replication

artifacts.name: Security Training Records
artifacts.description: Records of cloud security awareness and role-based training completion

artifacts.name: Change Management Log
artifacts.description: Log of all cloud infrastructure changes with approvals and rollback plans
